import_method.description: The wrapping method to be used for incoming key material. Possible values are: `RSA_OAEP_3072_SHA1_AES_256`, `RSA_OAEP_4096_SHA1_AES_256`, `RSA_OAEP_3072_SHA256_AES_256`, `RSA_OAEP_4096_SHA256_AES_256`, `RSA_OAEP_3072_SHA256`, `RSA_OAEP_4096_SHA256`.

protection_level.description: The protection level of the ImportJob. This must match the protectionLevel of the versionTemplate on the CryptoKey you attempt to import into. Possible values are: `SOFTWARE`, `HSM`, `EXTERNAL`.

key_ring.description: The KeyRing that this import job belongs to. Format: `'projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/keyRings/{{keyRing}}'`.

import_job_id.description: It must be unique within a KeyRing and match the regular expression [a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,63}
